login.registrationPendingApproval: Registration successful. Your account is pending admin approval.
login.genericError: An error occurred. Please try again.
login.localLoginSubtitle: Sign in with your local account
login.samlDisabledSubtitle: Corporate login is disabled, use a local account
login.corporateLoginSubtitle: Use your corporate account to continue
login.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in

login.adminLocalLogin: Are you an admin? Sign in with local account

errors.LOCAL_LOGIN_FORBIDDEN: You are not authorized for local login. Please use corporate login (SSO).
errors.ACCOUNT_NOT_APPROVED: Your account has not been approved by an admin yet. Please wait for approval.
errors.REGISTRATION_DISABLED: New user registration is currently disabled. Please contact your system administrator.
errors.MISSING_REQUIRED_FIELDS: Username, email and password are required.
errors.USER_ALREADY_EXISTS: This username or email is already in use.
errors.EXTERNAL_AUTH_NO_PASSWORD: Accounts using external authentication cannot change password.
errors.PASSWORD_TOO_SHORT: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.PASSWORD_COMPLEXITY_FAILED: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter and one digit.
errors.PASSWORD_NEEDS_UPPERCASE: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter.
errors.PASSWORD_NEEDS_LOWERCASE: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter.
errors.PASSWORD_NEEDS_DIGIT: Password must contain at least one digit.
errors.PASSWORD_CHANGED: Your password has been changed successfully.
errors.USERNAME_TOO_SHORT: Username must be at least 3 characters.
errors.INVALID_EMAIL: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.EMAIL_ALREADY_EXISTS: This email is already in use.
errors.INVALID_RETENTION_DAYS: Trash retention must be between 1 and 365 days.
errors.LOGOUT_FAILED: An error occurred while logging out.
errors.REGISTRATION_PENDING: Registration successful. Your account is pending admin approval.
errors.SAML_NOT_CONFIGURED: Corporate login (SAML) is not active. Please use a local admin account.
errors.SAML_ORG_ACCESS_DENIED: You are not authorized to access this application (organization restriction).
errors.FIRST_LAST_NAME_REQUIRED: First name and last name are required.
errors.EMAIL_OR_PHONE_REQUIRED: At least one of email or phone is required.
errors.CARD_UPDATE_FORBIDDEN: You are not authorized to update this card.
errors.CARD_HISTORY_FORBIDDEN: You are not authorized to view this card's history.
errors.VCARD_DOWNLOAD_FORBIDDEN: You are not authorized to download this vCard.
errors.CARD_DELETE_FORBIDDEN: You are not authorized to delete this card.
errors.CARD_ALREADY_DELETED: This card has already been deleted.
errors.CARD_RESTORE_NOT_DELETED: This card is not in trash.
errors.CARD_RESTORE_FORBIDDEN: You are not authorized to restore this card.
errors.CARD_PERMANENT_DELETE_FORBIDDEN: You are not authorized to permanently delete this card.
errors.EDIT_FORBIDDEN: You are not authorized to edit this record.
errors.DELETE_FORBIDDEN: You are not authorized to delete this record.
errors.PIN_FORBIDDEN: You are not authorized to pin this record.
errors.TAG_EDIT_FORBIDDEN: You are not authorized to edit this tag.
errors.TAG_DELETE_FORBIDDEN: You are not authorized to delete this tag.
errors.FORBIDDEN: You are not authorized for this action.
errors.INVALID_APPROVAL_VALUE: Approval value must be a boolean.
errors.CANNOT_DELETE_SELF: You cannot delete your own account.
errors.RATE_LIMITS_LOAD_FAILED: Failed to load rate limit data.
errors.TWO_FACTOR_SETUP_FAILED: Failed to set up two-factor authentication.
errors.CARD_NOT_FOUND_OR_PRIVATE: Card not found or sharing is private.
